headline: Stock Market Today, March 2: Ondas Climbs on $10M Investment and World View Defense Partnership
summary: Ondas rose after announcing a $10 million strategic investment and partnership that broadens its exposure to defense and homeland security markets.

headline: Axon Stock Soared After Earnings. Analysts Think It Can Gain Another 30% from Here.
summary: With Axon 911 taking shape through the Prepared and Carbyne acquisitions and $1.3 billion in ARR growing at 35%, the long-term growth case remains compelling, but a 332× forward earnings multiple means execution on software margins and deal integration has to be near-perfect for the stock to justify its premium at current levels.

raw.headline: Axon Stock Soared After Earnings. Analysts Think It Can Gain Another 30% from Here.

headline: 1 S&P 500 Stock with Impressive Fundamentals and 2 That Underwhelm
summary: The S&P 500 (^GSPC) is home to the biggest and most well-known companies in the market, making it a go-to index for investors seeking stability. But not all large-cap stocks are created equal - some are struggling with slowing growth, declining margins, or increased competition.
